ham.subject: Your SaaS subscription is up for renewal – Action required
ham.body:
Hi <Name>,

We hope you’re enjoying the full features of our SaaS platform. This is a friendly reminder that your subscription plan (Premium) will renew on 10th May 2026. The renewal amount will be INR 5,000.

Your account details:
Plan: Premium
Next Billing Date: 10th May 2026
Amount: INR 5,000

If you wish to make any changes to your plan or cancel, you can do so from your account dashboard.

Thank you for being a valued customer.

Best Regards,
[Company Name] Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Tax Refund Pending – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear Mr./Ms. <Name>,

We are writing from the Income Tax Department to inform you that a refund of INR 12,345 has been processed and is pending delivery to your bank account. Aapka refund pending hai, kripya bank details verify karein to ensure swift transfer.

Please click the link below to verify your details:
<URL>

Please complete verification within 48 hours to avoid cancellation. Failure to comply may result in your refund being forfeited.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
Income Tax Department
